title: Egyptian Fraction FAIL: demonstrates a wrong denominator sequence
sources: The Pythagorean Tree: A New Species (Price, 2008)
QA Koenig series and Egyptian fractions, elements.txt (Iverson, 1991)
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants a deterministically detectable violation: direction (d,e)=(3,2) (HAT1=2/3) declares denominators=[2,6] instead of the correct greedy expansion [2,6] should actually be checked -- using denominators=[2,7] which does not sum to 2/3 (1/2+1/7=9/14 != 2/3).

expansion.check: deliberately wrong: 1/2+1/7=9/14, not 2/3; correct greedy expansion of 2/3 is [2,6] (1/2+1/6=2/3)

fail_ledger.message: declared denominators=[2,7] sum to 9/14, expected e/d=2/3
